data.description: Greek fire brigade: Five unaccounted for after food factory blaze in central Greece.

data.title: WikiFX in Singapore clarified broker evaluation framework in 2026, emphasizing transparency based on verifiable data.
data.description: On January 25, 2026, WikiFX reiterated its dedication to trading safety by emphasizing its independent broker evaluation methods and transparency standards. The company confirmed that its assessments rely on verifiable data rather than subjective judgment. This commitment highlights WikiFX's emphasis on ensuring the safety and transparency of trading activities.

data.title: Moyom Biotechnology partners with WPP Group to enhance Aphranel's "Poetics of Time" brand positioning in a new venture.
data.description: On January 26, 2026, in Shanghai, Moyom Biotechnology revealed a new collaboration with WPP Group, a top global communications and creative network. This strategic partnership revolves around the "Poetics of Time" brand concept and aims to strengthen their market presence. The partnership brings together the expertise of Moyom Biotechnology in biotech with WPP Group's extensive global network. This collaboration is expected to enhance brand visibility and reach a wider audience.

data.title: Infortar bought own shares on Nasdaq Tallinn Stock Exchange from Jan 19 to 23, 2026.
data.description: Between January 19th and 23rd, 2026, Aktsiaselts Infortar purchased its own shares on the Nasdaq Tallinn Stock Exchange.

data.title: AMG LIVA to install Hybrid Energy Storage System battery at Aramco site in Saudi Arabia for efficiency, safety, and reliability.
data.description: Amsterdam, 26 January 2026 - AMG Critical Materials N.V. reports that its subsidiary, AMG LIVA, is set to deploy the Hybrid Energy Storage System (Hybrid ESS) at Aramco’s Bulk Plant in Tabuk, Saudi Arabia. This industrial battery system, a fusion of Lithium-Ion and Vanadium Redox Flow batteries, incorporates artificial intelligence technology and self-learning algorithms to optimize efficiency, safety, reliability, and longevity. The installation will be part of the existing solar plant at Aramco’s Tabuk facility, aiming to enhance its energy storage capabilities.

data.title: VEON launches new Beeline Uzbekistan Network Operations Center in Tashkent; introduces BuildX for software development.
data.description: In an event held in Tashkent on January 26, 2026, VEON Ltd. (Nasdaq: VEON), a global digital operator, introduced the new network operations center for Beeline Uzbekistan. The unveiling ceremony was graced by the presence of Sherzod Shermatov, Minister of Digital Technologies of Uzbekistan, along with Kaan Terzioglu, VEON Group CEO, Beeline Uzbekistan board members, and its executive team. Additionally, VEON announced the establishment of BuildX, a software development and artificial intelligence company in Uzbekistan on the same day.

data.title: Finance watchdog in UK close to finalizing consultation on crypto rules, seeks feedback on proposals to apply traditional finance standards to sector.
data.description: The UK's Financial Conduct Authority is currently gathering final feedback on proposed regulations for the country's cryptocurrency industry. The regulations aim to bring traditional financial standards to the sector and ensure compliance. Feedback from stakeholders will be crucial in finalizing these proposals, as the FCA works towards establishing a regulatory framework for the growing crypto market in the UK.

data.title: Binance founder CZ emphasizes 'real wealth' beyond money: health, loved ones, time, freedom, credibility, principles.
data.description: Binance founder, Changpeng "CZ" Zhao, shared his perspective on "real wealth" in a recent post, emphasizing that it transcends mere financial riches. According to CZ, true wealth encompasses elements such as health, relationships, time, freedom, credibility, principles, and positive influence. He highlighted the significance of being a content and morally upright individual, suggesting that it's never too late to prioritize these aspects over money. CZ's insights underscore a more holistic approach to wealth beyond monetary gain. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.
